title: Pack of Soft Treats For Cats - Salmon Tuna Flavour Pet Kitten Food Snack Meal Easily Digestible Low In Fat Added Vitamins Omega 3 & 6 - Reward Good Behaviour
features: These soft cat treats are made with real meat and fish, including chicken, duck, cod, salmon, and tuna, delivering a rich, protein-packed flavour that cats naturally crave.
Formulated with taurine—an essential amino acid cats cannot produce—these treats help support digestion, heart health, clear vision, and a strong immune system.
Enriched with vitamins C and E, these bites offer antioxidant benefits that help protect the immune system while promoting a glossy coat and healthy skin.
Omega 3 and 6 fatty acids are included to help reduce inflammation and nourish the skin, ensuring your cat stays comfortable, healthy, and visibly vibrant.
description: Product Description Cat treats Treat your cat to a delicious and nourishing snack with these soft bites and rolls, available in mouth-watering flavours like chicken, duck, cod, salmon, and tuna. Made with real meat or fish, each treat is rich in protein and packed with flavour that cats can’t resist. Formulated with taurine—an essential amino acid cats can't produce naturally—these treats help support digestion, vision, immune health, and heart function, making them a wholesome choice for your pet. Added vitamins Enriched with vitamins C and E for immune support and a glossy coat, these treats also include Omega 3 and 6 fatty acids to promote healthy skin and reduce inflammation. Low in fat and easy to digest, they’re suitable for cats of all breeds and ages, including those with sensitive stomachs. These soft-textured treats are ideal as a training reward, daily snack, or loving indulgence—offering both flavour and functional benefits in every bite.
